targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM((metadata::jsonb->>'pnl')::numeric), 0) AS value FROM trading.fills WHERE mode='paper' AND metadata::jsonb->>'kind'='settle' AND ts::date = (now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::date;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM trading.fills WHERE mode='paper' AND metadata::jsonb->>'kind'='entry' AND ts::date = (now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::date;

SELECT (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE metadata::jsonb->>'kind'='entry') - COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE metadata::jsonb->>'kind'='settle'))::int AS value FROM trading.fills WHERE mode='paper' AND ts > now() - interval '1 day';
SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - MAX(ts)))::int AS value FROM market_data.paper_ticks WHERE ts > now() - interval '5 minutes';

SELECT ts AS time, SUM((metadata::jsonb->>'pnl')::numeric) OVER (ORDER BY ts) AS equity FROM trading.fills WHERE mode='paper' AND metadata::jsonb->>'kind'='settle' AND ts > now() - interval '24 hours' ORDER BY ts;

SELECT o.ts_submit AS entry_ts, o.strategy_id, o.instrument_id, o.price AS entry_price, f_settle.price AS exit_price, (f_settle.metadata::jsonb->>'resolution') AS resolution, round(((f_settle.metadata::jsonb->>'pnl')::numeric), 2) AS pnl FROM trading.orders o LEFT JOIN trading.fills f_settle ON f_settle.order_id=o.order_id AND f_settle.metadata::jsonb->>'kind'='settle' WHERE o.mode='paper' ORDER BY o.ts_submit DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT o.strategy_id, count(*) FILTER (WHERE f_settle.order_id IS NOT NULL) AS trades, round(SUM(COALESCE((f_settle.metadata::jsonb->>'pnl')::numeric, 0)), 2) AS pnl_usd FROM trading.orders o LEFT JOIN trading.fills f_settle ON f_settle.order_id=o.order_id AND f_settle.metadata::jsonb->>'kind'='settle' WHERE o.mode='paper' AND o.ts_submit::date = (now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::date GROUP BY o.strategy_id ORDER BY pnl_usd DESC;

SELECT f.ts AS time, o.strategy_id AS metric, SUM((f.metadata::jsonb->>'pnl')::numeric) OVER (PARTITION BY o.strategy_id ORDER BY f.ts) AS equity FROM trading.fills f JOIN trading.orders o ON o.order_id = f.order_id WHERE f.mode='paper' AND f.metadata::jsonb->>'kind'='settle' AND f.ts > now() - interval '24 hours' ORDER BY f.ts;
